description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called deploy. Add a job named Git MIRROR in the deploy stage that executes the command `git push --mirror https://$BITBUCKET_USERNAME:$BITBUCKET_PASSWORD@bitbucket.org/exarh-team/skaro-qml.git`. The pipeline does not specify a Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or special rules, so it uses the runner's default image and runs on every pipeline. The job relies on the BITBUCKET_USERNAME and BITBUCKET_PASSWORD environment variables for authentication.
